# North Africa

**Summary**: Geographic study area or location in the thesis collection.

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-sitouah|Sitouah, 2009]] conducted research at North Africa

- [[2014-ahmed|Ahmed, 2014]] used field data from North Africa to validate the drilling models.

- [[2019-elzenary|Elzenary, 2019]] used field data from an oil well in North Africa to validate the HCI model.

- [[2014-ahmed|Ahmed, 2014]] used field data from North Africa to validate the drilling models.

## Key Findings From This Location

- conducted research at North Africa ([[2009-sitouah|Sitouah, 2009]])

- Real data from fields in North Africa were used for ROP, rock strength, and bit efficiency analysis. ([[2014-ahmed|Ahmed, 2014, p. 23]])

- Data from a well in this region showed critical hole cleaning conditions at depth 12480 ft. ([[2019-elzenary|Elzenary, 2019, p. 93]])
